changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION analytics.translation_value(translations jsonb, locale text, property text) RETURNS text LANGUAGE sql IMMUTABLE AS $$ SELECT (elem->>'value') FROM jsonb_array_elements(translations) elem WHERE elem->>'locale' = $2 AND elem->>'property' = $3 LIMIT 1 $$;

rollback.sql: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS analytics.translation_value(jsonb, text, text);
